fields.streaming: Stream the reply (refresh as it generates)

empty.noFilters: No filters — all events will trigger a job.

variables.webhook: Variables: {body} (full body), {body.field} (nested field), {query.key} (query param), {headers.name} (header), {method}, {path}. Leave empty to use the raw body.
variables.slack: Variables: {message} (user message), {user} (sender ID), {thread_context} (thread history), {thread_ts} (thread timestamp), {channel} (channel ID). Leave empty to use the raw message.
variables.wecom: Variables: {message} (user message), {user} (sender UserID), {channel} (group chat ID), {chat_type} (single/group). Leave empty to use the raw message.
variables.default: Variables: {message} (user message). Leave empty to use the raw message.

help.slackChannel: Only bot-joined channels are shown. Trigger: @mention bot in channel.
help.wecomChannel: All group chats share one route. After the bot is added to a group, mentioning the bot will trigger it.
help.filters: All rules must match (AND). Field syntax: body.field, headers.name, query.key, method, path.
help.sessionTtl: Messages in the same thread within this window share one session. Default: 24h.
help.requireMention: When unchecked, the bot auto-follows a thread after being @mentioned once. Prefix a message with (aside) to skip the bot. Requires message.channels (and message.groups for private channels) in the Slack App's event subscriptions.
help.streaming: When enabled, replies refresh in segments via the aibot_respond_msg streaming protocol so users see incremental output. Subject to WeCom's 30/min and 10-minute-per-stream quotas.

channel.loadFailed: Unable to load the Slack channel name. Showing the Channel ID.
channel.notFound: This Channel ID was not found in bot-visible channels. It may be inaccessible, archived, or hidden by permissions.

switchDialog.title: Switch to a Git source?
switchDialog.body: "{{name}}" will be tracked from Git instead of being authored here. The skill keeps its identity and every workspace / template using it stays attached.
switchDialog.warning: Its version history (and any unpublished draft) will be permanently deleted — only the version fetched from Git remains. This can't be undone.

publicLink.title: Create public link
publicLink.description: Generate a public URL for this file so you can share it with people outside the workspace.
publicLink.warning: Anyone with this link can read the file until it expires — no login required. Make sure the contents are safe to share.
publicLink.warningPermanent: This link never expires. Anyone who ever sees the URL can read whatever lives at this path — including future overwrites. Revoke it from "Manage public links" once you're done.
publicLink.folderNote: The link points at the folder; sub-paths under it are reachable too (e.g. …/sub/img.png). Opening the folder itself serves its index.html if present, otherwise a .zip download.
publicLink.expiresNever: Never expires — manage from "Manage public links".

managePublicLinks.title: Manage public links
managePublicLinks.description: Active public URLs minted for files in this workspace. Revoking a link is immediate and cannot be undone.

officePreview.unsupported: Office preview is not configured in this environment

tooltips.remove: Remove this Skill from the workspace. The Skill stays in your library.
